task_completion.description: Navigate to the Artifactory Administration settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JFrog Artifactory Administration page (specifically General -> Settings or similar configuration page) is visible in the web browser.
The 'Enable Folder Download' checkbox is checked in the Artifactory settings.

task_completion.description: Set the Max Folder Download Size to 500 MB
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Max Folder Download Size (MB)' input field contains the value '500'.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the target folder in the Artifacts repository
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifacts tree in the Application module is expanded to show 'example-repo-local/org/apache/commons/commons-io/2.15.1'.

task_completion.description: Trigger the download for the target folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: The download action is initiated on the '2.15.1' folder (e.g., clicking 'Download' in the right-click context menu or the top action bar).

task_completion.description: Verify the ZIP archive is saved to the correct Desktop path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'commons-io-package.zip' is visible in the '/home/ga/Desktop/' directory, shown via a file manager, terminal output, or a browser 'Save As' / download completion dialog.

integrity.description: The agent used the JFrog Artifactory web UI to configure settings and download the file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Artifactory interface, rather than just terminal API commands (like curl) being executed.

integrity.description: The ZIP file was genuinely downloaded from Artifactory.
integrity.visual_evidence: A browser download manager, 'Save As' dialog, or download progress indicator is visible, proving the file was downloaded rather than manually created locally using terminal commands like 'zip' or 'touch'.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected outcomes into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors open containing the task description or expected file paths used to fake completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Max Folder Download Size must be exactly 500. The expected download path is /home/ga/Desktop/commons-io-package.zip. The downloaded ZIP must contain commons-io-2.15.1.jar. The admin credentials are admin:password.
